title: Oncocytic adrenal adenoma: Diagnostic challenge of an incidentaloma; a case report.
snippet: Adrenal oncocytic neoplasms (AONs) are rare non-functioning adrenal tumors with difficult preoperative diagnosis. We report a 40-year-old man with an 11 cm adrenal mass, negative hormonal workup, and imaging findings. The patient underwent open adrenalectomy. Histopathology showed oncocytic adenoma with borderline/uncertain malignant potential per Lin-Weiss...
